## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullets -->
- 

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code change, no feature/fix
- [ ] chore — build, deps, config

## Testing done
<!-- How did you verify this works? -->
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested in browser (describe what you tested)
- [ ] No console errors

## Architectural decisions
<!-- If you introduced a new pattern, library, or structure — document it here so the other Claude instance picks it up -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch is from `dev`, not `main`
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used
- [ ] No `.env` values or secrets committed
